tasks.title: Fix URL capture for LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit
tasks.description: URL capture fails on 3/4 platforms. Only X works. Without post URLs, metric scraping and billing cannot run.

tasks.title: Stripe top-up verification + idempotency fix
tasks.description: Verify test-mode Stripe Checkout credits company balance correctly. Fix double-credit bug on success redirect.

tasks.title: Verify CSRF tokens in all Flask forms
tasks.description: flask-wtf installed but need to verify every POST form has csrf_token() hidden input and CSRFProtect is initialized.

tasks.title: Install slowapi + apply rate limiting to auth endpoints
tasks.description: slowapi not installed on server. Add rate limiting to login/register endpoints (5/minute).

tasks.title: Invitation UX — countdown timers, expired badge, decline reason
tasks.description: No countdown timers on invitations, no visual expired state, no decline reason capture.

tasks.title: Metrics accuracy — populate anomaly_flag, cross-validation
tasks.description: anomaly_flag column exists but never populated. No cross-validation between Playwright and API metrics.

tasks.title: Repost campaign company creation UI
tasks.description: Backend model exists for repost campaigns but no company dashboard UI to input per-platform post text.

tasks.title: Admin payout void/approve actions
tasks.description: Admin payout page is read-only. Need void and approve buttons for fraud management.

tasks.title: Metric scraping — detailed spec per platform, verify E2E
tasks.description: Write detailed spec for what each platform scraper extracts. Verify against real posts. Needs deeper spec first.

tasks.title: Billing — detailed spec for earnings calc, verify E2E
tasks.description: Spec for billing pipeline: CPM multiplier, budget cap, hold period, platform cut, tier promotion. Verify with real metrics.

tasks.title: Earnings display — server-to-local sync, withdrawal, verify E2E
tasks.description: No sync from server Payout records to local_earning. User app shows $0. Spec sync mechanism, breakdown, withdrawal flow.

tasks.title: AI matching — detailed spec for scoring logic, verify accuracy
tasks.description: Spec for matching prompt, scoring criteria, brand safety, audience overlap. Verify with real campaigns and profiles.

tasks.title: AI profile scraping — Gemini Vision, per-platform detailed spec
tasks.description: Per-platform spec (X, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit) for all data to extract. Current implementation is single-screenshot, unverified.

tasks.title: 4-phase content agent — research, strategy, creation, review
tasks.description: Current strategy is static dict. Needs deeper spec for goal-driven strategy, creator voice matching, trending topics, platform-native content.

tasks.title: AI campaign quality gate — detailed rubric spec
tasks.description: Current rubric is static 8-rule scoring. Needs niche-specific thresholds, inter-field validation, actionable feedback.

tasks.title: Content formats — threads, polls, carousels across platforms
tasks.description: Research most-used formats per platform by engagement data. Build JSON posting scripts for top formats. Re-enable Instagram/TikTok.

tasks.title: Free/Pro tiers — wire Stripe subscription billing
tasks.description: SUBSCRIPTION_TIERS config exists. Wire Stripe subscription checkout, webhook handler, enforce feature gates.

tasks.title: Write automated test suite (pytest)
tasks.description: Zero automated tests. Create pytest infrastructure, server/client/integration tests covering the full money loop.

tasks.title: Stripe live integration — company Checkout + user Connect onboarding
tasks.description: Live Stripe keys on Vercel. Webhook endpoint for payment confirmation. User Stripe Connect Express onboarding for real payouts.

tasks.title: PyInstaller packaging — Windows installer
tasks.description: Update amplifier.spec for current codebase. Bundle all modules + Playwright + templates. Build Inno Setup installer.

tasks.title: Mac support — cross-platform audit + packaging
tasks.description: Audit Windows-specific code (fonts, paths, crypto). Fix for Mac. Build Mac package. Test full pipeline.

tasks.title: Landing page — public-facing site for acquisition
tasks.description: Static site explaining Amplifier. CTAs for download (users) and create campaign (companies). Deploy to Vercel.

tasks.title: Periodic DB backup in background agent
tasks.description: Copy data/local.db to data/local.db.bak every 6 hours in background agent loop.

tasks.title: Status label renaming in user app templates
tasks.description: Replace internal names: pending_invitation to Invited, content_generated to Draft Ready, posted to Live, paid to Earned.

tasks.title: Clipboard copy button for post URLs
tasks.description: Add Copy URL button next to each post URL on Posts tab.

tasks.title: Client-side form validation in user app
tasks.description: Add required attributes, email format, number range validation to all forms.

tasks.title: Server-side post URL dedup
tasks.description: Prevent same post URL registered twice via POST /api/posts. Return error on duplicate.

tasks.title: ToS and privacy policy acceptance in registration
tasks.description: Add ToS checkbox to registration. Block if unchecked. Create /privacy and /terms pages.
